scripts.pages:create: wrangler pages project create kunal-digital-twin --production-branch main --compatibility-date 2026-05-02 --env-file .dev.vars
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy --project-name kunal-digital-twin --env-file .dev.vars
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy --project-name kunal-digital-twin --branch preview --env-file .dev.vars
scripts.db:create:remote: wrangler d1 create kunal-digital-twin --binding DB --location apac --env-file .dev.vars
scripts.db:inspect:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command "SELECT id, category, title, sort_order FROM memories ORDER BY sort_order ASC, title ASC;"
scripts.db:inspect:remote: wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --env-file .dev.vars --command "SELECT id, category, title, sort_order FROM memories ORDER BY sort_order ASC, title ASC;"
scripts.secret:account: wrangler pages secret put CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID --project-name kunal-digital-twin --env-file .dev.vars
scripts.secret:token: wrangler pages secret put CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN --project-name kunal-digital-twin --env-file .dev.vars
scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check functions/api/chat.js && node --check lib/chat-foundation.js && node --check lib/memory-store.js && node --check lib/workers-ai.js && node --check data/kunal-memories.js && node --check scripts/build-pages.js && node --check scripts/import-chatgpt-export.js && node --check scripts/import-openai-response.js && node --check scripts/extract-memory-candidates.js && node --check scripts/review-memory-candidates.js && node --check scripts/set-candidate-status.js && node --check scripts/apply-memory-candidates.js && node --check scripts/_lib/d1.js && node --check scripts/_lib/dev-vars.js && node --check scripts/_lib/chatgpt-export.js && node --check scripts/_lib/workers-ai-rest.js
